chain.thought: Explanation: Besides "Lady in the Jaguar," another song title that includes an animal is "They Pray with Snakes," so the animal named is snakes.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
Reviewing the song titles, only “lady in the jaguar” explicitly features an animal term. While “they pray with snakes” contains the word “snakes,” it is used within a phrase and does not serve as a distinct named animal in the title in the same way; no other title presents an animal as a standalone named entity. Therefore, there is no other animal named in a song title besides a jaguar, aligning with the Prediction Answer of null.
